title: Using assignments to support mastery learning
description: A check for understanding of the Using assignments to support mastery learning lesson.
topic_path: Using assignments and reports on Khan Academy
Using assignments to support mastery learning
Using assignments to support mastery learning

assessment_items.question_content:
**On Khan Academy, which of the following can be given as an assignment?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: On Khan Academy assignments can be in the form of **videos**, **exercises**, **unit tests**, and **course challenges**.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Fill in the blanks.**

[[☃ dropdown 1]] reports provide teachers with [[☃ dropdown 2]] detail into student performance - including identifying common [[☃ dropdown 3]] and indicators of student effort.
hints: **Assignment reports** provide teachers with **greater detail** into student performance - including identifying common **misconceptions** and indicators of student effort.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Fill in the blank.**

Please be mindful of how many assignments are in each unit when assigning whole units. We suggest no more than [[☃ dropdown 1]] assignments at a time to avoid overwhelming students.
hints: Please be mindful of how many assignments are in each unit when assigning whole units. We suggest no more than **three** assignments at a time to avoid overwhelming students.

assessment_items.question_content:
Assignments can be made for specific students, for an entire class, or for multiple class periods all at once.

**True or false.**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Khan Academy allows assignments to be made for specific students, for an entire class, or for multiple class periods all at once.

assessment_items.question_content:
You can assign different questions for each student or the same questions when assigning practice exercises.

**True or false.**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Khan Academy allows you to assign different questions for each student or the same questions when assigning practice exercises.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which tab allows teachers to confirm an assignment was created, edit an assignment, or delete an assignment?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Teachers can confirm an assignment was created, edit an assignment or delete an assignment from the **Manage tab**.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Fill in the blanks.**

On Khan Academy, videos and articles are considered [[☃ dropdown 1]] assignments whereas exercises, quizzes, and unit tests are [[☃ dropdown 2]] assignments.
hints: On Khan Academy, videos and articles are considered **instructional** assignments whereas exercises, quizzes, and unit tests are **practice** assignments.

assessment_items.question_content:
**How many times can a student retry an assignment on Khan Academy?** 

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: As many times as they need

assessment_items.question_content:
**Why can Khan Academy's assignments be a valuable tool in your teaching toolkit?** 

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Assignments allow you to align content with your lessons.
Assignments facilitate learning new skills at grade level.
Assignments encourage students to tackle more complex concepts.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Fill in the blanks.**

[[☃ dropdown 1]] are your main instrument for guiding student learning, while [[☃ dropdown 2]] are supplementary tools to be used as necessary.
hints: **Mastery goals** are your main instrument for guiding student learning, while **assignments** are supplementary tools to be used as necessary.
